claude-council-main.integrationNote: Prompt-based layer — no local install required

gpt-pilot-main.integrationNote: Python env missing pydantic — run pip install in venv before use

claude-code-main.integrationNote: Installed as CLI — no repo needed

n8n-master.integrationNote: Run via npx or Docker — no local clone required

reflex-main.integrationNote: reflex not in PATH — install via pip in active venv

ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.description: Premium AI design intelligence CLI — 161 reasoning rules, 67 UI styles
ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.integrationNote: Use as direction layer before Next.js page implementation. Feeds into emovel.premium_ui_director skill. Ref: knowledge/stack-library/UX_LAYER.md

21st-sdk-main.description: Open-source SDK + runtime for building, deploying, and embedding 21st Agents (React/Node/Next.js monorepo)
21st-sdk-main.installCommand: Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\21st-sdk-main; cd C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\21st-sdk-main; npm install
21st-sdk-main.integrationNote: Component source layer for premium pages. Use with emovel.premium_ui_director. Also consumable via npx shadcn CLI for individual components without full repo extraction. Ref: knowledge/stack-library/UX_LAYER.md

quant-ux-master.description: Open-source UX research and prototyping tool — usability testing, heatmaps, interaction analytics
quant-ux-master.installCommand: Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\quant-ux-master; cd C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\quant-ux-master; npm install; npm run serve
quant-ux-master.integrationNote: Self-hosted UX research layer — use to prototype and test EMOVEL page designs before live deployment. Optional addition to the design validation flow.

nano-banana-2-ai-main.description: Next.js frontend for Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Model — 4K image generation, 5-character consistency
nano-banana-2-ai-main.installCommand: Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\nano-banana-2-ai-main; cd C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\nano-banana-2-ai-main; npm install; npm run dev
nano-banana-2-ai-main.integrationNote: Use for fast AI image generation in content-engine workflows. Community mirror at bananaai.run. Pairs with awesome-gpt-image-2 prompt library.

nano-banana-pro-main.description: AI image generator — Gemini 2.5 Pro Image Model, native 2K/4K upscaling, 5-8s generation, 95% character consistency
nano-banana-pro-main.runtime: No code — documentation and configuration reference only
nano-banana-pro-main.integrationNote: README-only package. Extract as reference documentation for Gemini 2.5 Pro image generation. Not a runnable app — use nano-banana-2-ai-main for the executable version.

awesome-gpt-image-2-api-and-prompts-main.description: Curated collection of 911 prompts for GPT Image 2 API — includes Seedance 2.0 cinematic workflow, 10-language support
awesome-gpt-image-2-api-and-prompts-main.integrationNote: Extract as prompt reference library for content-engine image generation. Pair with nano-banana-2-ai-main or GPT Image 2 API calls in n8n workflows. License CC0 — fully free to use commercially.
